title: AutoHeal - User Input Protection: Focusless-First + Focus Theft Recovery
desc: [RULE] Skill content MUST be in English -- Korean uses 2-3x tokens. PHILOSOPHY: focusless-first is the PRIMARY goal. Recovery is safety net only. SELF-REPORTING: when theft is detected, OnFocusTheft auto-classifies (guarded-race vs unguarded-gap) and files suggest via AutoBugReport. LIVING DOCUMENT: check suggest list periodically and resolve incoming CDP theft reports.
steps: 0. [RULE] ALL skill steps/desc/tags must be English only -- token efficiency.
1. [PHILOSOPHY] Focusless-first: every CDP action should never need OS foreground. Recovery = safety net. Priority: (1) focusless design, (2) recovery as backstop.
2. [MANDATORY] Restore trigger = end of each ask/CDP action only. Watchdog = monitor+notify only.
3. [MANDATORY] ALL restore paths go through InputReadiness.Probe(SkipBlocker/Knowhow/Zoom=true, AutoApproveYield=true).

4. [FOCUSLESS PATTERN] (a) check visibilityState=visible->skip, (b) SW_SHOWMINNOACTIVE(8), (c) WaitForWindowStateAsync('minimized'), (d) CDP call, (e) RestoreChromeNoActivate SW(4), (f) WaitForWindowStateAsync('normal'). Ref: SwitchToTargetAsync, BringToFrontAsync.

5. [DEVICE INSERTION = SELF-REPORTING] Insert AutoBugReport at every theft detection point. OnFocusTheft classifies: UNGUARDED (method not in IsFocusStealingMethod -> add focusless pattern) vs RACE (guarded but WaitForWindowStateAsync coverage incomplete). Each detection files a suggest automatically -- no manual audit.

6. [OPERATIONAL] Log files to check: runtime/cdp-focus-risk.jsonl (per-method focus risk log), runtime/cdp-minimize-watchdog.jsonl (minimize state tracking). Periodic actions: wkappbot suggest list -> review CDP theft reports -> apply focusless pattern fix -> resolve with evidence script.
7. [INVESTIGATION] When theft occurs check: (a) which action, (b) CDP method, (c) IsFocusStealingMethod()?, (d) SW=8?, (e) WaitForWindowState not fixed delay?, (f) OnFocusTheft restores?
8. [DONE] SW(6)->SW(8) everywhere. BringToFrontAsync: WaitForWindowStateAsync. OnFocusTheft: ForceForegroundWindow+RestoreFocusWithRetryAsync+AutoBugReport suggest.
9. [DONE] EnsureCdpReadyAsync: InputReadiness.Probe(). RestoreFocusWithRetryAsync: AutoBugReport on 5s timeout.
10. [DONE] EnsureWindowReady: ForceForegroundWindow. AskGemini: prevFg re-capture after persona. DismissDialogAsync: 동의.
author: claude
